product_name: Sands of Mars — Arthur C. Clarke (Pocket Books #989, 1954)
attributes: 1954 • Pocket Books #989 • 1st Paperback Printing • Cover Art by Robert Schulz
condition_notes: Vintage science-fiction paperback: Arthur C. Clarke, 'The Sands of Mars,' Pocket Books #989, 25-cent edition. Per the copyright page: Pocket Book edition published April 1954, 1st printing February 1954 (the first US paperback printing; follows the 1951 Sidgwick & Jackson UK edition, 1952 Gnome Press hardcover, and 1953 Science Fiction Book Club edition). Cover painting by Robert Schulz. Condition: worn reading copy — a vertical crease/split runs through the front cover, the top-right corner has some loss, with edge/corner wear, soiling, and age-tanned pages; complete and readable, binding intact. Sold as-is.

square.buy_link_note: Square checkout link created 2026-06-19: $8 book + $5 USPS Media Mail shipping ($13 total), asks for shipping address.
